title: Syzygium angustifolium
taxonomy: Syzygium angustifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant is a member of the genus Syzygium, which includes over 1,000 species of flowering plants. The Myrtaceae family consists of shrubs, trees, and herbs, many of which are commonly known as myrtles. Syzygium angustifolium is a part of this diverse family of flowering plants.
